description_long: This is a modern, boxy house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring large rectangular windows on the front and side facades. The exterior is clad in light gray and beige materials, with a mix of smooth and textured surfaces. The front of the house includes a prominent entryway with a set of stairs leading up to a raised porch, flanked by metal railings and a landscaped planter. The house has two visible stories, with the upper floor partially open to the interior, revealing rooms and staircases. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and a focus on clean lines. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric forms and open, airy spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a minimalist facade featuring a raised entryway and clean geometric lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with stairs, a raised porch, large windows, and a landscaped planter.
description_view_1: Side view with minimal windows, highlighting the house's boxy shape and the extended porch area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying expansive windows across the lower level and a simple, flat roofline.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a mix of large and small windows, and a clear view of the interior layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a raised porch, metal railings, wide steps, and a simple modern door
